meaning: n.(北欧神话中奥丁神的婢女之一)瓦尔基里
examples: Hear that? We're heading to the Valkyrie training camp.
Inspired by the picture of a Valkyrie I found on the Internet.
The star is due in London next week to promote his latest film, Valkyrie.
Valkyrie - named after Operation Valkyrie, the plot's codename - will be directed by Bryan Singer and co-star British actor Kenneth Branagh.
